svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1E293B;

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Inter, Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#1E293B, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));
